3157530.name: Witchling Grove
3157530.description:
Descending into the ancient Groves, a witch searches for lost magicks, friends and rivals, and an end to the curse plaguing the land!

____________________________________________________________

Witchling Grove is a top down action shooter with procedurally generated areas and encounters.
Explore the hallowed Groves after they have been warped by a mysterious evil, encountering deadly creatures, powerful, fantastic spells, and viciously guarded secrets as you make your way closer to the the source of the calamitous curse.

Features

  • Fast paced and smooth action gameplay, tuned to capture nostalgia but also feel modern to play!

  • Full and complete local co-op!  In this economy!?

  • 13 hidden spells, to be mastered and mutated as a mighty spellcaster.

  • 9 Sacred Groves, holy sites of the ancient Witching orders, each with unique flora, fauna, and dangers.

  • Knowledge is Power - The Bestiary catalogues your encounters with the hundreds of types of monsters in this land.  As you defeat them, learn their weakness, oddities, and magical potentials...
